name: Weekly TikTok Script Generation

parameters.text:
=*Weekly TikTok Script — {{ $json.week }}*

Top performer: *{{ $json.performer_name }}* ({{ $json.performer_skill }}, trust score {{ $json.trust_score }}/100)

```
{{ $json.script }}
```

Review, adjust tone, then schedule on TikTok/Reels/Shorts.

notes: Fires every Monday at 09:00 UTC. Fetches top performer from analytics leaderboard API. Generates a 60-second TikTok script. Posts draft to #marketing Slack channel for human review before publishing. Slack credential: 'AiStaff Slack Internal' — configure in n8n credential store.
